subcodes.first_line: By God, besides Whom there is no other God! Today there is no service to the Cause of God greater than the acquisition of divine qualities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فو اللّه الّذی لا اله الّا هو الیوم خدمتی بامر الله اعظم از تخلّق باخلاق نیست
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @business; financial; property matters, @justice and mercy, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
